newsSince: Two notable items since June 9: (1) Scorpio X-Series 320-lane scale-up AI Fabric switch and expanded PCIe 6 P-Series now shipping/ramping to hyperscaler lead platforms targeting a ~$20B 2030 scale-up switching TAM — a genuine fundamental strengthening of node centrality; (2) added to the Nasdaq-100 effective June 22, which drives passive/benchmark buying (flow, not fundamentals). Q1 2026 revenue was a record $308.4M, +93% YoY, with Q2 guide $355-365M. The +17.4% move blends real scale-up momentum with index-inclusion flow.

sources.label: Futurum — Astera Q1 FY26 scale-up switching ramp

verdicts.rankRationale: On the residual-alpha-vs-passives lens, June 22 Nasdaq-100 inclusion makes ALAB MORE owned by benchmark/passive funds, eroding the asymmetry this page rewards. Scorpio ramp is real but doesn't restore residual alpha at ~$70B cap. Slight negative.
verdicts.bull: Best-in-class PCIe 6 / scale-up fabric franchise; +93% YoY revenue still compounding fast.
verdicts.neutral: Great company, but index inclusion + $70B cap is the opposite of under-owned residual alpha.
verdicts.bear: Maximally passive-owned post Nasdaq-100; hyperscaler concentration; high P/S means little residual mispricing.

verdicts.rankRationale: Scorpio X-Series 320-lane scale-up switch now shipping to hyperscaler lead platforms ($20B 2030 TAM) genuinely strengthens connectivity-node centrality since June 9. At rank 4 there is little room up, and the page's 'smaller visibility' tilt is offset by Nasdaq-100 fame — net real fundamental uptick, hold rank.
verdicts.bull: Scale-up fabric switching ramp opens a new multi-billion TAM beyond retimers; PCIe 6 leadership; +93% YoY.
verdicts.neutral: Node centrality clear; upside on this list capped at rank 4.
verdicts.bear: Now maximally visible at ~$70B; valuation/hyperscaler concentration risk on any AI capex pause.

verdicts.rankRationale: On the CPO lens, the Scorpio scale-up switching ramp deepens rack-scale copper/optical transition exposure, but ALAB remains tangential to CPO cables proper and the page's stated risk (high P/S, hyperscaler concentration) is exactly what is being repriced. Slight positive, hold.
verdicts.bull: Owns the rack-scale connectivity transition where copper meets optics; scale-up TAM expanding.
verdicts.neutral: Adjacent to CPO, not a pure co-packaged-optics play.
verdicts.bear: High P/S and hyperscaler concentration; not a direct CPO supplier.

verdicts.rankRationale: On the master under-owned-bottleneck list, the scale-up switch ramp is genuine bottleneck exposure, but Nasdaq-100 inclusion (June 22) directly erodes the 'under-owned' premise. The two roughly offset to a slight net positive; hold rank.
verdicts.bull: Central PCIe/CXL + scale-up fabric bottleneck in AI racks; rapid revenue compounding.
verdicts.neutral: Bottleneck real, but ownership no longer scarce post index inclusion.
verdicts.bear: Passive-crowded at $70B; rerated; concentration on a few hyperscalers.
